primary_sources.relevance: UAX #31 states that joining controls and variation selectors are in XID_Continue but recommends removing Default_Ignorable_Code_Point values for general-purpose identifiers and points to the UTS #39 General Security Profile.
Defines the General Security Profile and its identifier-security boundary.

finding: Passing XID_Start/XID_Continue syntax is insufficient for general-security admission because invisible Default_Ignorable_Code_Point values, including joining controls and variation selectors, can remain syntactically eligible. A separate fail-closed exclusion gate is required before registry mutation.

verification.environment: isolated Node runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files
cases: base registry mutation blocked before rejection

uncertainty: The full authenticated Unicode 17.0.0 DerivedCoreProperties dataset was not processed in this run.
This does not implement script restriction, bidi safety, or contextual exceptions.
Digest metadata is meaningful only when supplied through the repository's authenticated bundle path.
falsification_route: Show an authenticated Default_Ignorable_Code_Point admitted by the gate.
Show an ordinary non-default-ignorable identifier rejected solely by this gate.
Show malformed overlapping or descending ranges accepted by the parser.
Find a Unicode 17.0.0 General Security Profile reference case that disagrees with the evaluator.
privacy_boundary: Public standards and repository implementation only; no private chat, health, credentials, identifying personal data, or unreviewed uploads included.
